debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
    haveI : ∀ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False : Measure Prop) :=
      fun i ↦ ⟨by simp [ENNReal.coe_add.symm]⟩
    change map ((fun s ↦ i ∈ s) ∘ X) P = map ((fun s ↦ j ∈ s) ∘ X) P
    rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable, ← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable,
      hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map]
    rw [Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    simp only [Function.comp_def, MeasurableEquiv.setOf_symm_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    rw [map_eval_infinitePi, map_eval_infinitePi]
    simp [hi, hj]

by
    simp only [← map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map,
      map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    change map (fun p ↦ p i) _ = map (fun p ↦ p j) _
    rw [map_eval_infinitePi, map_eval_infinitePi]
    simp [hi, hj]

    have : ∀ k, IsProbabilityMeasure (toNNReal p • dirac (k ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) :=

        unitInterval.coe_add_symm]⟩
    rw [← map_map (by fun_prop) X.aemeasurable, ← map_map (by fun_prop) X.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq,

    simp [hi, hj]
